samples: I am new and want the fastest path to understand GoalOS.
I want to understand the 48 Ethereum Mainnet contracts.
I want to run a public-safe proof mission.
I want to evaluate an AI vendor or tool using evidence, not marketing claims.
I want to understand Loop to RSI governance.
I want to check privacy, token, and data boundaries.
I want to design a controlled pilot where every serious pilot ends with a docket.
